content.en:
Luanfeng Continent.

The people of the Feng family migrated here, and gradually accepted this fact and began to build a new foundation belonging to the Feng family.

A large number of Feng family powerhouses began to build palaces, arrange large arrays, and open up cultivation places everywhere.

Soon, buildings rose from the ground and occupied a large area.

And the people of the Feng family also chose to live in the mansion one by one, and the whole Feng family seemed to be peaceful.

Abrupt.

A figure tore through the void and descended on the sky above the Luanfeng Continent.

This time, Ye Tian did not have a body to descend, otherwise once he was recognized, whether it was the identity of the Ten Thousand Laws Dao Ancestor or the identity of the Nine Extremes Heavenly King, it would be very dangerous.

He still chooses to copy the body, after all, this time it is the Feng family under the command of the Heaven Destroying Emperor Palace, once the Heavenly Emperor Palace learns about it, for the sake of face, he must also investigate thoroughly, so he must be careful not to reveal his identity.

This time, Ye Tian did not copy his own body, but the body of another Sevenfold Heavenly Dao Ancestor - Stone Eagle Dao Ancestor!

The Stone Eagle Dao Ancestor is the ultimate Dao Ancestor of the Seven Heavens, and he definitely has the strength to easily destroy the Feng family.

Moreover, he had explored the talent of the Stone Eagle Dao Ancestor and knew that the Stone Eagle Dao Ancestor had two Dao-level natal talents, one was the Stone Dao-level Natal Talent - Rock Dragon Armor, and the other was the Ice Dao-level Natal Talent - Cold Wind!

Therefore, Ye Tian was going to use an ice Dao technique that he had never used before, the Ice Shadow Cold Qi Technique, which could be disguised as the Stone Eagle Dao Ancestor.

At that time, even if the Heavenly Emperor Palace had the means to find out, it would only think that it was Shi Ying Dao Ancestor who did it, and would not suspect him.

Besides, the Feng family was looking for trouble with him, looking for a killer from the Killing Temple to kill him, and the Heavenly Emperor Palace probably didn't know, how could they suspect him?

It's just that if you do this, you will really be miserable for Shiying Dao Ancestor.

"Shiying Dao Ancestor, I'm sorry, who called us enemies!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Although Ye Tian copied the body of the Stone Eagle Dao Ancestor, he had also been disguised and changed his aura slightly, otherwise wouldn't it be like it?

Who will kill people, and still don't change their breath, and kill in the light?

Ye Tian descended on the sky above the Feng family, attracting the attention of the Feng family's Dao ancestors.

"Who is Your Excellency?"

A Dao Ancestor of a famous family appeared.

Although the Feng family is down, there are quite a few Dao Ancestors, and there are dozens of them.

At this moment, these dozens of Dao Ancestors all appeared, surrounding Ye Tian one by one.

"Kill your guys!"

Ye Tian instantly cast the Great Thousand Dao Technique of Ice and Cold Qi Technique, although this Great Thousand Dao Technique, Ye Tian did not cultivate much, and was only in the Xiaocheng realm, but Ye Tian's own strength was too strong, so the power of this Dao Technique was also extremely terrifying.

In an instant, a famous Dao Ancestor was frozen in ice, and he did not have the slightest power to resist.

The cold air spread, freezing the buildings that the Feng family was building, and countless Feng family members were frozen in ice.

In a short period of time, the entire Luanfeng Continent was frozen by the Ice and Cold Qi Technique, and all living beings were wiped out.

Destroying a continent was nothing to Ye Tian, this continent belonged to the nascent primeval continent, and it was full of some fierce beasts and a few races that contained the bloodline of primeval chaos life.

As long as there are no human beings, Ye Tian will not be soft.

With one move to exterminate the Feng family, Ye Tian left quickly without staying, so as not to be discovered by the powerhouses of the Heavenly Emperor Palace, so as not to be intercepted.

......

The Feng family has just moved, and many forces are familiar with the Feng family, and no matter how downtrod the Feng family is, it is also a big family, so many ordinary families from the Heavenly Emperor Palace, as well as a few true ancestors and Dao ancestors, will still come to the Feng family as guests.

And the Feng family had invited many people to the Feng family to participate in the new family construction banquet before, so not long after, one by one, strong people descended on the Luanfeng Continent.

But what they saw was the Luanfeng Continent that was frozen in ice, and the Feng family who died in ice.

Soon, the news spread back to the Heavenly Emperor Palace.

Suddenly, the Heavenly Emperor Palace was furious!

-----------------

Emperor Guangling came to Luanfeng Continent with a group of Dao Ancestors, originally this small matter did not need him to deal with, but this matter was different.

First of all, the Feng family had just left the Heavenly Emperor Palace, and it was destroyed in a blink of an eye, and the impact was too great.

The Heavenly Emperor Palace doesn't care about some weak Dao Ancestors, but it cares about face, this is someone provoking the Heavenly Emperor Palace, if it is not handled well, how will the countless families in the Heavenly Emperor Palace think of this matter?

Therefore, Emperor Guangling thoroughly investigated the matter.

"This should be the Great Thousand Dao Technique Ice Shadow Cold Qi Technique, it is a relatively common Great Thousand Dao Technique, and there are many, many Dao Ancestors! Judging from the degree of cold qi, it should be a Sevenfold Heavenly Dao Ancestor!" Emperor Guangling judged.

There are quite a few Seven Heavenly Dao Ancestors in the Xuanxu Ancient Realm, and which Dao Ancestors are proficient in the Ice Dao Technique, there are also a lot, and there is no way to investigate it from this aspect at all.

"You must investigate through the breath left by the other party!"

Emperor Guangling muttered.

Immediately, he deduced the identity of the other party through the aura of Taoism left by the other party, and the deduction technique was also one of the important means of investigation, but this deduction technique often failed, so there were too many treasures to shield the deduction technique.

Even if he is an invincible Dao Ancestor, there is no way to easily deduce the identity of the murderer.

Rumble!!!!

The deduction technique operates, and one picture after another is revealed, and the other party's face is not clear, and only the traces of the other party's shot can be seen.

With one move, the Luanfeng Continent was frozen, and all the people of the Feng family fell.

Emperor Guangling stared at the figure, constantly probing the identity of the other party, and suddenly the picture shattered, and he couldn't fully detect it.

"No, if the deduction technique is used to deduce the true ancestor, it is very easy, but it is a little difficult to deduce the sevenfold heavenly dao ancestor!"

Emperor Guangling muttered.

Moreover, the deduction of the true ancestor may not be able to be deduced all, for example, the true ancestor who stole his Guangling Han Palace treasure house at the beginning, he did not find out who it was, and the deduction technique could not be deduced, and it seemed that he was shielded by the other party with treasures.

And the other party did things very cleanly, leaving no clues.

But this time, the other party used the Ice Cold Qi Technique to freeze the continent, leaving too much breath, even if it was hidden and did not reveal its true identity, as long as the secret treasure was used, there was still a way to find out the identity of the other party.

"It seems that the Time and Space Emperor Mirror of the Heavenly Emperor Palace must be used!"

Emperor Guangling muttered.

There are three emperor mirrors in the Heavenly Emperor Palace, namely the Time and Space Emperor Mirror, the Haotian Emperor Mirror and the Wheel Emperor Mirror, among which the Time and Space Emperor Mirror specializes in investigating the identity of the enemy, and it is almost invincible.

Subsequently.

Emperor Guangling applied to the Heavenly Emperor Palace to use the Time and Space Emperor Mirror, but in the end, only a wisp of the Emperor Mirror incarnation was allowed, because the Time and Space Emperor Mirror was more precious than the Haotian Emperor Mirror, and no problems could occur, so he was not allowed to leave the Heavenly Emperor Palace.

But a wisp of the incarnation of the Space-Time Emperor Mirror was enough to detect the identity of the enemy.

On the Luanfeng Continent, Emperor Guangling mobilized a wisp of the time-space emperor mirror to begin to absorb the aura of Taoism, probing the enemy's space-time fragments, and judging the enemy's true identity from the space-time fragments.

Rumble!!!!

The Time and Space Emperor Mirror operated, and soon a figure appeared on the Time and Space Emperor Mirror, which was stripped away layer by layer, revealing its true appearance and true aura.

When he saw that person's appearance and breath, Emperor Guangling was furious.
